response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an accomplished full-stack and backend software engineer with over 15 years of experience, but his background is almost entirely in web services, mobile development, and cloud-native software — with no discernible experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization. While he has touched low-latency systems and has a passing mention of embedded systems and robotic arms, none of this translates to the silicon-level performance architecture expertise this Principal role demands. His AI exposure is limited to agentic software tooling (MCP frameworks), not accelerator performance analysis or DNN training/inference optimization.
strengths: Long tenure and breadth across performance-adjacent domains: low-latency microservices at Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec demonstrates systems-level thinking
Polyglot engineer comfortable with low-level languages (C, C++, D) which are relevant in hardware-adjacent tooling contexts
Meets the BS+8yr experience threshold (BS CS + ~14 years of professional experience)
concerns: Zero SoC or IP modeling experience — the core technical requirement of the role is entirely absent from the resume
No GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator architecture background; AI work is limited to agentic software tooling, not hardware optimization
Career trajectory is firmly in web/cloud software engineering with no indication of a pivot toward hardware or deep-learning systems performance work

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU architecture background
